Lessons > 27. Practice Manipulating Data: Yelp

  • Appreciations: Take 30 seconds to thank someone from the course staff who helped you.
  • Project 1 Showcase: Take a look at your fine work and that of your classmates!
  • Today we will continue practicing how to work with Cloud-based data services (Twilio, Yelp, Spotify), which we will be doing for the rest of the quarter (today and Wednesday).

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Review the Slides

  1. Practice Working with Web APIs
